title: Limitations of Classical Computing
description: Explore the fundamental barriers classical computers face - from physical limits to computational impossibilities - that quantum computing aims to overcome.
learningObjectives: Understand physical limits of classical computation (Moore's Law)
Learn about inherently hard problems (undecidability, NP-hardness)
Explore the limits of parallelism and Amdahl's Law
Understand why certain simulations are intractable
Connect limitations to quantum computing motivation
